name: Miners’ Assembly
summary: Institutional organizer of mining labor, extraction safety, and ore reporting.
day_to_day: Schedules crews, tracks yields, assigns safety reviews, and manages extraction priorities.
who_works_there: Foremen, miners, safety inspectors, ore clerks, transport liaisons.
who_uses_it: Industrial planners, engineers, caravans, frontier settlements.
authority: Can approve extraction pushes, close dangerous shafts, and allocate mining labor.
public_manifestation: Shift whistles, ore ledgers, camp notices, hazard briefings.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Pressure for deeper extraction collides with the physical limits of workers and rock.
